complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Unify analyser-timed FX under the effects timeline (single control surface)
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down into: 1) Remove duplicate LOGO_GLITCH controls from Branding and update compositor to use timeline clips only; 2) Implement BEAM timeline authority with auto clip generation from ghost schedule; 3) Audit and align remaining effect kinds (ZOOM, SCREEN_SHAKE, etc.); 4) Update UX flows, documentation, migration handling, and comprehensive testing.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: High complexity due to refactoring multiple interconnected systems (compositor, Gradio UI, effects editor, timeline model) with risk of breaking existing render behavior. Multiple dependencies (49, 53) and detailed migration requirements increase effort. Strong test strategy mitigates some risk but implementation spans UI, backend logic, and data model changes.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Divide into: 1) Implement GLSLBackground class with moderngl rendering and audio-reactive uniforms; 2) Integrate into background factory, mode normalization, and Gradio UI dropdown; 3) Create comprehensive unit/integration tests and documentation.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Moderate-high complexity involving OpenGL shader integration (moderngl Context/FBO management), audio uniform mapping, and factory/UI integration. Dependencies on multiple prior tasks (8,36,40,67). Well-defined protocol implementation but requires careful GL resource lifecycle management and testing.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Vendor Butterchurn JavaScript Assets and Headless Browser Shim
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Split into: 1) Download, validate, and organize Butterchurn JS assets, presets, licenses, and create fetch script; 2) Implement HTML/JS shim with GLITCHFRAME_BC API and manual testing.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Medium complexity: primarily asset management and HTML/JS shim creation. Fetch script needs idempotency and hash validation. API contract is well-defined but requires understanding Butterchurn internals for time-deterministic rendering.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Divide into: 1) Playwright browser/page setup and preset loading; 2) Frame advance with audio uniforms and deterministic time advancement; 3) Canvas pixel extraction to numpy arrays with determinism testing.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: High complexity due to browser automation (Playwright), canvas pixel extraction, audio uniform serialization, and strict determinism requirements. Performance target (<50ms/frame) adds challenge. Dependencies on task 58.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Python Butterchurn Preset Index with Sort, Search, and Author Filter
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break into: 1) Implement PresetEntry dataclass, author parsing regex patterns, and ButterchurnPresetIndex class with search/filter/sort methods; 2) Add comprehensive unit tests for parsing, filtering, and sorting.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Low-medium complexity: pure Python data processing with regex parsing and list filtering/sorting. Well-scoped with clear data model and test strategy. Singleton pattern adds minor state management.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Butterchurn BackgroundSource Implementation and Factory Integration
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Split into: 1) Implement ButterchurnBackground class implementing BackgroundSource protocol; 2) Update background factory and mode normalization; 3) Gradio UI integration, state management, and documentation.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Moderate-high complexity integrating new background mode into existing factory/UI architecture. Multiple dependencies (58,59,60,13). Runtime pooling adds resource management complexity.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Pre-render Static PNG Thumbnails for Butterchurn Presets
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Divide into: 1) Implement thumbnail generation script using ButterchurnRuntime with fixture audio; 2) Add thumbnail path helpers, gitattributes configuration, and documentation.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Medium complexity: script processes ~760 presets with image optimization. Dependencies on core Butterchurn infrastructure. Idempotency and resume capability add minor complexity.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down into: 1) Implement cache key computation and WebP rendering with RuntimePool; 2) LRU eviction policy and async wrapper; 3) Comprehensive testing including cache hit/miss scenarios.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Moderate-high complexity with caching, LRU eviction, async integration, and WebP animation encoding. Performance optimization and pool management add challenge.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Divide into: 1) Implement gallery handlers (filtering, search, favourites); 2) Gradio UI layout with gallery, controls, and selection panel; 3) State management and integration with background mode switching.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Moderate-high complexity for rich Gradio UI with filtering, gallery, async previews, and state synchronization. Dependencies on multiple prior Butterchurn tasks.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Final Butterchurn + GLSL Background Tests, Docs, and Integration Polish
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Split into: 1) Comprehensive smoke and E2E tests for all background modes; 2) Complete documentation cross-linking and README enhancements.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Low-medium complexity: testing and documentation. Benefits from prior detailed test strategies but requires coordination across multiple components.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Hybrid SDXL Anchor + Butterchurn Background Mode
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Divide into: 1) Implement HybridAnchorBackground with anchor selection and crossfade logic; 2) Factory and Gradio UI integration; 3) Testing of blending behavior and reactive intensity.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: High complexity combining two complex background systems with sophisticated timeline-based blending logic. Anchor selection from analysis.json adds analysis dependency.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Track A2: torch 2.7+cu128, WhisperX 3.3.6+, ctranslate2 4.5+ (RTX 50 / Pinokio)
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break into: 1) Update dependency pins in pyproject.toml, requirements.txt, and Pinokio install.js; 2) Validate core pipeline (lyrics alignment, SDXL, etc.) on Windows/Pinokio and update docs.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Medium complexity dependency upgrade with platform-specific validation (Windows/Pinokio/RTX 50). Risk of compatibility regressions but well-defined validation strategy.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Track A2 follow-up: remove obsolete torch compat shims and cudnn copy hacks
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Identify and remove: 1) torch_xpu_compat.py patches; 2) windows_provision_cudnn script; 3) speechbrain_compat simplifications; 4) stale comments. Validate no regressions.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Low-medium complexity cleanup task dependent on successful Track A2 migration. Primarily code removal with validation testing.
Low complexity coordination/documentation task. Primarily verification and documentation updates rather than implementation.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Pinokio: absorb RTX 5080 installer feedback (post Track A2)
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Incorporate tester feedback: 1) Refine install.js/start.js based on torch.js patterns; 2) Remove duplicate torch resolution; 3) Validate clean reinstall behavior.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Low-medium complexity incorporating external feedback into installer scripts. Dependent on prior Pinokio tasks.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Evaluate options: 1) Test community forks/alternatives (Essentia); 2) Implement librosa-only fallback with documentation; 3) Update analysis pipeline to handle missing beat detectors gracefully.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Medium complexity dependency resolution for Python 3.11 compatibility. Requires evaluation of alternatives and graceful degradation path.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Investigate Align lyrics empty Whisper textarea
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Debug investigation: 1) Reproduce in torch 2.7+cu128 Pinokio; 2) Audit Gradio handler return wiring and exception handling; 3) Add logging and fix root cause.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Low-medium complexity debugging task. Primarily investigation and small fix once root cause identified.
